chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1750 of 2025. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A No.7054/25. 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on M.A No.7055/25. 4. For hearing of main case. 09.10.2025. Mr. Muhammad Idris, Advocate for Petitioner. ***************************************** 1. Urgency granted. 2to4. Counsel present for Petitioner submits that an Application(s) for demarcation of land are pending before Respondent No.2 & 3 (Deputy Commissioner, Hyderabad and Director Settlement of Survey & Land Record Revenue), but the same are not being decided after considerable lapse of time. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, learned Additional Advocate General, present in Court in other matters has waived notice of instant Petition and submits that if the Application(s) of Petitioner are pending before Respondent No.2 & 3, same shall be adjudicated on merits. At this stage, the petitioner's counsel, being satisfied, seeks disposal of the instant petition. In view of the foregoing, the instant Petition is disposed of with directions to Respondent No.2 & 3/ competent authority to decide the Petitioner’s pending Application(s) by speaking order within two months in accordance with law and after granting the Petitioner a fair opportunity of hearing. Office to communicate a copy of this order with the office of learned A.A.G. JUDGE JUDGE Ali.
